theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Neo-Brutalist elements
theme_and_archetype.description: A playful, energetic, and tactile design. Uses raw structures (thick borders, hard shadows) paired with warm pastel backgrounds to feel like a creative student's interactive sketchbook, avoiding the sterile corporate look and avoiding all purple/violet AI gradients.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase leading-none

design_system_rules.surfaces: Neo-brutalist style. Flat backgrounds with 2px solid black borders and hard black drop shadows (e.g., `shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]`). Never use soft blurred shadows.
design_system_rules.interactions: Hover states should lift elements (`-translate-y-1` or `-translate-x-1`) and increase the hard shadow spread (`shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]`).
design_system_rules.borders: border-2 border-black for all major structural elements to create compartmentalization.
design_system_rules.spacing: Generous spacing. Use `p-8` to `p-12` inside bento grid cards to let content breathe.
design_system_rules.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (`@phosphor-icons/react`), specifically the `duotone` or `bold` weights for a punchy look.

layout_strategy.global: Grid-breaking asymmetry combined with structural bento boxes. Mobile-first grid collapsing.
layout_strategy.hero: Massive typography taking up large portion of the viewport. Raw, uncluttered.
layout_strategy.gallery: Masonry or asymmetric grid (MODE A: 'TETRIS' GRID) mixing landscape and portrait placeholder slots.

content.tagline: CS student building worlds in Unreal Engine, one pixel and one photograph at a time.
content.subtext: Hi, I'm Patrini Suryawanshi. I mix code, 3D art, and photography.

sections_and_content.style: Oversized H1 split into multiple lines. Add a playful floating element or rotating badge ('Available for Collab' in JetBrains Mono).

cards.title: The Coder
cards.desc: B.Tech CSE student passionate about clean logic and systems.

cards.title: The Creator
cards.desc: Certified Canva Designer & exploring 3D spaces in Blender.

sections_and_content.style: Cards with varying spans. Mix of accent colors for card backgrounds (e.g., one card yellow bg, one white, one blue).

sections_and_content.layout: Full width, border-t-2 border-b-2 border-black py-6 bg-[#FFD600]
sections_and_content.style: Fast-moving marquee using `react-fast-marquee`. Huge uppercase mono text.

content.heading: Currently Exploring
content.body: Diving deep into Game Development with Unreal Engine. Always open to creative collaborations, game jams, or just geeking out over tech.

sections_and_content.style: High energy layout. Use the neon game controller image here with a hard neo-brutalist shadow offset.
Images must have 2px black borders and hard shadow. Hover to reveal location/category tag.
Dark background (#0A0A0A) with white/neon accents to contrast the light theme above. Huge footer text.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements (buttons, nav links, social icons, gallery items) MUST include a kebab-case `data-testid` attribute based on their role.
